title: Fire-Boltt International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Fire-Boltt International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Fire-Boltt International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fire-Boltt International Enterprises:
Fire-Boltt International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt International Enterprises!
